commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ed3018506ea59a17e3a581b4adb6a9e61aca4f50)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds agent-scoped Policy plugin overlays under `scopes.agents.<scopeName>` for `tools` and `agents.workspace`, exact `tools.alsoAllow.expected` conformance, focused tests, and policy documentation.

PR surface: Source +683, Tests +679, Docs +245. Total +1607 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a new policy grammar/config feature, not a bug report. I verified the source and focused tests in the PR commit, but did not run tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Manual maintainer/security review is the right next action because this protected Policy PR adds user-facing audit grammar and the remaining proof must come from the contributor's real setup.

target.title: Policy: add agent-scoped policy overlays
target.author: giodl73-repo
